creator: johan@moon.campus.luth.se
text:
Misspelled word on line 94 in rc.conf:
	arpproxy_all="YES"              # replaces obsolete kernel option ARP_PROXY_ALL.
	Should be:
	arpproxy_all="YES"              # replaces obsolete kernel option ARP_PROXYALL.

Fix: 

See above.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Obvious.
